lines.text: How long have I been in slumber... This nightmare... How long was I trapped in it?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Are you also part of the dream?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I am. Travelers from afar, I sense… the kindness pulsing in your hearts. You must be the ones who broke the chains of my nightmare.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The oathbreakers, hiding behind their Masks of Madness… They tainted the Nimbus Sanctum with corrupted blooms, drowning me in rage and sorrow. Endless nightmares became my prison.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Had you not freed me from my nightmare, I would never be able to fulfill the Sentinel's task… The tides of the Nimbus Sanctum would have engulfed the whole of Ragunna, just as they once claimed the sacred temple now lying in ruins beneath you.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Yes, the Sentinel molded me from a mindless being to the form you see, and bestowed upon me the most precious gift... A soul.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: They commanded me to restrain the clouds and prevent the Remnant Energy within it from... dissipating.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Unfortunately, it lies beyond my power. The Sentinel's link to the mortal realm is severed. Only through collective prayer, and a rite, at the height of the Carnevale, only then can mortals briefly commune with Them.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I'm afraid the Sentinel's current state... transcends mortal understanding. Your Primus is no exception.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Should doubt linger in your mind, I implore you to await the rite's completion. The Sentinel will surely answer the people's call—not your so-called… Enlightened One.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: All that I know is that they are not from Rinascita.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: In the whispers between dreams, I heard them speak of their leader, a woman they called…
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It is time I return to my slumber. Their wicked acts have scarred the sea of clouds, and I must mend it… within my dreams.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The song shall guide you out of this domain. Farewell, visitors.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
